products.pageDescription: Curated institutional-grade bullion bars and coins. Secure your wealth in physical assets at live market prices.
products.tryAdjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters or search term.
products.portfolioGuidance: Our smart platform guides you toward a balanced precious metals portfolio tailored to your budget and risk appetite.
home.heroSubtitle: Own real precious metals by the gram. Tibr gives you access to authentic gold and silver bullion at live market prices — no experience needed, starting from any amount.
home.features.flexibleDescription: Start with any amount, any time
home.features.liquidityDescription: Buy and sell instantly at market price
home.bento.title: Why Tibr?
home.bento.description: We redefine investment by merging the physical stability of gold with the speed of modern financial technology.
home.bento.storageDescription: All your physical assets are stored in high-security certified vaults with real-time blockchain audit trail — verifiable at any moment.
home.bento.analyticsDescription: Monitor your portfolio performance with precision through real-time market data dashboards.
home.bento.executionDescription: Global liquidity lets you buy and sell in milliseconds at live spot prices.
home.bento.advisorDescription: Our platform analyzes market conditions and guides your investment decisions toward more stable, profitable opportunities — right when you need it.
home.journeyTitle: Your Investment Journey, Simple and Smart
home.journey.step1.title: Set Your Goals
home.journey.step1.description: Tell us your investment goals, risk level, and preferred metals. Takes less than 2 minutes.
home.journey.step2.title: Invest with Ease
home.journey.step2.description: Start with any amount in Egyptian Pounds. Buy fractional gold and silver instantly.
home.journey.step3.title: Grow Your Wealth
home.journey.step3.description: Track your portfolio's real-time performance and watch your savings grow securely.
home.journey.step4.title: Automate and Scale
home.journey.step4.description: Set up recurring investments and let smart automation build your portfolio over time.
home.trust.title: SECURITY FIRST, ALWAYS
home.trust.subtitle: Built on Trust, Secured by Design
home.trust.feature1.title: Certified Storage
home.trust.feature1.description: All physical assets stored in certified, insured, and independently audited vaults.
home.trust.feature2.title: Live Audit Trail
home.trust.feature2.description: Verify your assets at any moment through our encrypted audit gateway.
home.trust.feature3.title: Identity Verified
home.trust.feature3.description: KYC-compliant onboarding ensures full compliance with Egyptian financial regulations.
home.cta.title: Ready to protect your
home.cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Egyptians already investing in precious metals through Tibr.
